# Tasks - 2026-06-28

Implementation breakdown for the three issues in
`.github/research/2026-06-28-plan.md`. Each task is sized so a single
engineering-agent run can complete it.

## Issue 1: [provider] formatProviderError preserves error.cause

- **T1.1** Create `src/providers/format.ts` exporting
  `formatProviderError(err: unknown): string`. Branches: non-Error,
  Error without cause, Error with Error-shape cause (formats name +
  message + optional code). Hard cap recursion at depth 2.
- **T1.2** Wire into `src/core/orchestrator.ts:84`: rewrite the
  rethrown error's `.message` to the formatted string when it
  differs. Do NOT wrap into a new class.
- **T1.3** Same wire at `src/core/streamingOrchestrator.ts:162`.
- **T1.4** New file `tests/providers/format.test.ts` with 4 cases:
  undici reference, plain Error, non-Error input, depth bound.
- **T1.5** New file `tests/core/orchestrator.error.test.ts` mocking
  `src/providers/index.js` to reject with an undici-shape error;
  assert rethrown `.message` contains the cause's name AND code.
- **T1.6** Run the full gate (`lint && typecheck && format:check &&
  test:coverage && build`) green.

## Issue 2: [command] /cost today + StatusBar per-routed-model

- **T2.1** In `src/cli/interactive.ts:1298` (the `today` branch),
  copy the `By Model:` rendering block from `:1329` (month) into
  `today`. Guard with `Object.keys(summary.byModel).length > 0`.
- **T2.2** Extend `StatusBarProps` in
  `src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx:8` with optional
  `topModelLabel?: string`. Render dimmed in the context-info
  segment between cost and tokens lines.
- **T2.3** In `src/cli/tui/pages/ChatPage.tsx:103` and
  `src/cli/tui/pages/LogsPage.tsx:90`, compute top model from
  `getCostTracker().getTodaySummary().byModel` (highest `.cost`)
  and pass it as `topModelLabel`. Reuse the existing cost hook;
  do NOT add a new poll loop.
- **T2.4** Add snapshot case to
  `tests/cli/tui/StatusBar.test.tsx` rendering with
  `topModelLabel="gpt-5.5"` and asserting the label appears.
- **T2.5** New file `tests/cli/interactive.cost.test.ts` recording
  two model calls into `costTracker`, capturing `console.log`,
  running the `/cost today` handler, and asserting both model names
  appear in output.
- **T2.6** Run the full gate green.

## Issue 3: [config] Compaction token budgeting + headroom

- **T3.1** In `src/core/compaction.ts:71`, update
  `estimateMessagesTokens` to prefer
  `(m.tokens.input ?? 0) + (m.tokens.output ?? 0)` when at least one
  is a non-zero number; otherwise fall back to chars/4. Keep the +4
  per-message structural overhead.
- **T3.2** Extend `CompactionOptions` (`:15`) with optional
  `reserveOutputTokens?: number` (default 4096).
- **T3.3** Overload `shouldCompact` to accept either the legacy
  `threshold?: number` positional or an options object
  `{ threshold?, reserveOutputTokens? }`. Compute
  `triggerTokens = max(0, maxContextTokens - reserveOutputTokens)`
  and compare current vs `triggerTokens * threshold / 100`.
- **T3.4** Update `compactConversation` (`:262`) so when an options
  bag with `reserveOutputTokens` (or a known trigger budget) is
  supplied, it grows the "to summarize" bucket from the head until
  `estimateMessagesTokens(toKeep) + summaryMaxTokens <= 0.8 * triggerTokens`.
  Preserve the last `preserveLastN` invariant unchanged.
- **T3.5** Extend `src/core/__tests__/compaction.test.ts` with the
  three assertions in the issue body: recorded tokens preferred,
  reserve protects output, post-compact second call does not
  re-trigger.
- **T3.6** Run the full gate green. Do NOT touch
  `SessionManager.checkAndCompact` in this issue â€” follow-up.
